name: Greek Beef and Eggplant Lasagna (Moussaka)

ingredients.item: Two tablespoons of fresh chopped dill
A pinch of crushed black pepper

method: Take a large bowl.
Add the eggplant, beef mince, potatoes, baby spinach into a bowl.
Mix the olive oil, salt, and crushed black pepper into the bowl.
Bake the ingredients in an oven for about twenty minutes.
Take a large pan.
Add the olive oil and onion into the pan.
Cook the onions until they turn soft.
Add the minced garlic into the pan.
Cook the ingredients well.
Add the feta cheese, salt, and black pepper into the pan.
Mix all the ingredients well and add the chopped dill into the
Add the baked beef and vegetables into the pan and then mix
everything well.
Add the tomato sauce and béchamel sauce on top of the
vegetable mixture.
Bake for another ten minutes.
Your dish is ready to be served.
